reading.title: Reading: A house for rent
reading.passage: FOR RENT: A small house with a garden. There are two bedrooms and one bathroom. There is a kitchen and a living room with a balcony. The house is quiet and comfortable.

questions.question: There is a balcony in the living room.
The house is expensive.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn không nói về giá thuê.

reading.title: Reading: Moving into a new room
reading.passage: There isn't a sofa in my new room yet, but there is a bed and a desk. There aren't any shelves, so my books are on the floor. Is there a mirror? Yes, there is one next to the door.

questions.question: What is missing from the room?
questions.explanation: "There isn't a sofa... There aren't any shelves".

questions.question: There is a mirror next to the door.
questions.explanation: "Yes, there is one next to the door."
